name: frontend-spec-workflow
description: OpenSpec-based frontend workflow plugin for Codex. Bundles discussion drafting, test-scenario enumeration, test-code generation, and OpenSpec solidification for feature and project delivery.

interface.shortDescription: OpenSpec-based workflow plugin for frontend discussion, spec solidification, and test generation
interface.longDescription: Provides a workflow-oriented frontend engineering plugin for Codex. It helps teams stabilize discussion drafts, enumerate testing scenarios, generate concrete test code, and converge accepted context into durable OpenSpec assets.
defaultPrompt: Use Frontend Spec Workflow to write frontend discussion drafts into planning/frontend/
Use Frontend Spec Workflow to enumerate frontend testing scenarios before OpenSpec solidification
Use Frontend Spec Workflow to generate frontend test files from OpenSpec and scenario drafts
Use Frontend Spec Workflow to solidify the accepted frontend scope into openspec/
